chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1st Appeal No. 59 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 10.11.2025. Mr. Muhammad Sulleman Unar, Advocate for appellant. = For reasons to be recorded, this 1st Appeal is dismissed being hopelessly barred by limitation. JUDGE Tufail
